title: Sole Archive
description: Inspect and configure six fictional sneakers in an underground boutique with exploded materials, comparison, wishlist, sizing, and a persistent demo cart.

prompt.objective: Build a sneaker archive around six fictional releases.

mintAssets.brief: Six sneakers plus concrete boutique fixtures.
Eight close-up footwear and architectural material surfaces.
A campaign image for every sneaker release.
Subterranean ambience with material and cart cues.

experience: Inspect, configure, explode, compare, and wishlist the six releases.
Choose a size and build a persistent demonstration cart with a mock checkout.
prompt.visualDirection: Underground boutique in charcoal concrete with sharp typography and acid-green accents.

thumbnail.alt: Sole Archive showing the Sublevel Zero sneaker in a dark acid-green configurator with product controls.

social.title: Sole Archive
social.description: Configure six fictional sneakers in an underground acid-green boutique.

image.alt: Sole Archive showing the Sublevel Zero sneaker in a dark acid-green configurator with product controls.
